table._pullback_comment: CCM pulled toward identity. Base V-shape alpha(2000K)=alpha(10000K)=0.5, alpha(5000K)=0.2; then additional +0.3 global pullback (saturation dialled down one more step). Effective alpha vs original measured matrix: 2567K=0.61, 4862K=0.45, 5625K=0.47, 10000K=0.65. Row sums preserved = 1.0.
